tasks.name: Book a 60-minute AI strategy consultation for a manufacturing team on October 10, 2026 at 2:00 PM
tasks.description: Use the consultation booking flow to schedule a 60-minute AI strategy session for a manufacturing client with 5 participants on October 10, 2026 at 2:00 PM, with a stated budget range of $10,000–$25,000. Success is achieved when the consultation request form is submitted with all specified details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled "Book Consultation" or "Schedule a Call".
In the service type dropdown, select "AI Strategy Consultation".
In the duration options, select "60 minutes" as the meeting length.
Open the industry dropdown and choose "Manufacturing" as the industry.
Use the date picker to select October 10, 2026 and the time picker to select 2:00 PM.
In the participants or team size field, type "5" as the number of attendees.
Open the budget range dropdown and select the option that corresponds to "$10,000–$25,000".

Fill in the name field with "Alex Rivera", the email field with "alex.client@example.com", type "Discuss AI roadmap for our manufacturing plants" in the notes or goals field, and click the primary button labeled "Submit Request" or "Confirm Booking".

tasks.name: Select a mid-size AI transformation package under $12,000 with at least 2 workshops and request a proposal
tasks.description: From the pricing or packages page, identify a mid-size business AI transformation package that costs $12,000 or less and explicitly includes at least 2 workshops, then submit a proposal request for that package. Success is achieved when a proposal request form is submitted that references the qualifying package.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Pricing", "Plans", or "Packages".
Use the client size filter or dropdown to select "Mid-size" (for example, 50–500 employees).
Adjust the budget or price filter so that the maximum price is set to "$12,000".
Scroll through the list of mid-size packages and open the details page or expanded view for each package priced at $12,000 or less.
From these packages, identify one that states it includes at least "2 workshops" or more and click its button labeled "Request Proposal" or "Get This Plan".
On the proposal request form, confirm that the selected package name is shown in the package or plan field (if editable, keep it unchanged).
Fill in the company size or employees field with "120", and choose a desired project start month of "September 2026" from any date or month selector.

Enter "Jordan Lee" in the contact name field, "jordan@example.com" in the email field, "AI transformation for regional offices" in the project description field, and click the primary button labeled "Submit", "Send Request", or similar.

tasks.name: Add 3 short-duration retail AI case studies with ROI ≥ 20% to a reading list
tasks.description: From the case studies section, find retail or e-commerce AI projects published between 2022 and 2026 that show ROI of at least 20% and project duration under 6 months, then add 3 such case studies to the site's reading list or saved items feature. Success is achieved when 3 qualifying case studies have been added to the reading list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled "Case Studies" or "Client Stories".
Use the industry filter to select "Retail & E-commerce".
Use the date or year filter to show only case studies from 2022 to 2026, and apply any available ROI or impact filter to show entries with "ROI ≥ 20%".
Scroll through the filtered results and open the detailed view of each case study that mentions an ROI of at least 20%.

Within each opened case study, look for the project duration information and identify those where the duration is listed as "under 6 months" or equivalent (such as "3 months", "4 months", or "5 months").
For the first 3 case studies that meet both criteria (ROI ≥ 20% and duration under 6 months), click the button or icon labeled "Add to Reading List", "Save", or "Bookmark".
After adding 3 qualifying case studies, navigate to the "Reading List" or "Saved Items" section via the site header or user menu, and click into it to complete the task.

tasks.name: Complete the AI Readiness Assessment and open the recommended service booking page
tasks.description: Fill out the site's AI Readiness Assessment by selecting specified answers, then follow the recommendation to open the booking or contact page for the primary suggested service. Success is achieved when the booking or contact form for the recommended service is reached from the assessment result.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item or banner labeled "AI Readiness Assessment" or "Take the Assessment".
On the first question about company size, select the option corresponding to "201–500 employees" (or the closest match available).
On the question about data infrastructure maturity, select the middle-level option such as "Some centralized data" or "Partially standardized".
On the question about AI experience, choose the option indicating "Pilot projects only" or "Early experiments".

For the remaining assessment questions, select answers indicating moderate readiness (for example, choose mid-range options for budget, leadership support, and technical skills), and then click the button labeled "Submit Assessment" or "View Results".
On the results page, locate the primary recommended service card (for example, "AI Strategy Roadmap" or similar) and click on its main call-to-action button such as "Book Now" or "Learn More".
On the resulting recommended service page, click the button labeled "Book Consultation", "Contact Us", or similar to open the booking or contact form for that specific service.

tasks.name: Register for a GenAI marketing webinar next month between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Find an upcoming webinar related to Generative AI for marketing that takes place next calendar month with a scheduled time between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM, and complete the on-site registration form. Success is achieved when the registration form for a qualifying webinar is submitted.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Resources", then select "Events & Webinars" from the dropdown or submenu.
Use the date filter to select "Next Month" as the time range for events.
Use the topic or category filter to select "Marketing" or "GenAI for Marketing" and apply the filter.

If a time-of-day or schedule filter is available, set it to show events between "11:00 AM" and "3:00 PM"; otherwise, open each marketing-related webinar result and look for one scheduled with a start time between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM.
From the qualifying webinars, identify one with "GenAI" or "Generative AI" in the title and click its title or "View Details" link to open the event detail page.
On the webinar detail page, click the primary button labeled "Register", "Sign Up", or similar.
On the registration form, enter "Taylor Morgan" in the name field, "taylor@example.com" in the email field, and "Marketing Manager" in the role or job title field.
If there is a company field, enter "BrightWave Co.", select "Yes" or an equivalent option for "Receive updates" if presented, and click the main button labeled "Complete Registration" or "Submit".

tasks.name: Configure a financial services AI project estimate and submit a detailed proposal request
tasks.description: Use the project estimator to configure an end-to-end AI strategy and implementation project for a financial services client with an 8-person team, a 16-week timeline, and a budget range of $100,000–$250,000 that includes data audit and training but excludes MLOps setup, then submit a proposal request based on this configuration. Success is achieved when the proposal request form with the configured options is submitted.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Project Estimator", "Get an Estimate", or similar.
In the industry dropdown, select "Financial Services".
In the engagement scope section, select or check the options for "Strategy & Roadmap" and "Implementation" so that the configuration represents end-to-end work.
In the modules or components list, select the options for "Data Audit" and "Team Training", and explicitly leave "MLOps Setup" or similar deployment infrastructure options unselected.
Set the team size field or slider to "8" people and adjust the timeline control to "16 weeks".
Use the budget range selector to choose a range that falls between "$100,000" and "$250,000".
Click the button labeled "Calculate Estimate", "Generate Plan", or similar, and then click the subsequent call-to-action labeled "Request Detailed Proposal" or "Talk to Sales".

On the proposal request form, enter "Morgan Patel" in the name field, "morgan.patel@example.com" in the email field, "16-week AI program for our wealth management division" in the project notes or description field, and click the main submission button.

tasks.name: Add 3 AI governance blog posts under 10 minutes read time from the last 12 months to a reading queue
tasks.description: From the blog or insights section, find AI governance articles published in the last 12 months with an estimated read time of under 10 minutes and add 3 of them to the site's reading queue feature. Success is achieved when 3 qualifying posts are added to the reading queue.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Insights", "Blog", or "Articles".
Use the search bar on the blog page to type "AI governance" and submit the search.
Apply any available date filter to restrict results to posts from the last 12 months.
Use the topic or tag filter to select "Governance & Ethics" or the closest matching category.
Sort the filtered results by "Newest" or "Most Recent" using the sort dropdown.

Scroll through the filtered, sorted list and identify posts where the displayed estimated read time is less than 10 minutes, then click the "Add to Reading Queue", "Save for Later", or similar button on the first 3 such posts.
After adding those 3 posts, click the "Reading Queue" or "Saved Articles" link or icon in the header or sidebar to open the queue page and complete the task.

tasks.name: Choose the most affordable remote AI training program for 30 European team members under $8,000 with at least 2 live sessions and start booking
tasks.description: From the training or academy section, identify a remote AI training program suitable for a 30-person team in Europe that costs $8,000 or less and includes at least 2 live sessions, then initiate the booking process for the most affordable qualifying program. Success is achieved when the booking form for the selected training program is opened and initial details are submitted.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Training", "Academy", or "Workshops".
Use the delivery format filter to select "Remote" or "Virtual" training options only.
Use any region or time-zone filter to select "Europe" or "EMEA" as the target region.
Set the team size or participant capacity filter to include programs that allow at least 30 participants, and adjust the budget or price filter so that the maximum price is set to "$8,000".
Scroll through the filtered list and open the detail pages for each program that meets the capacity and price criteria to view the number of live sessions included.
From the qualifying programs that include at least 2 live sessions, identify the program with the lowest listed price and click its "Book Training", "Request This Program", or similar primary button.

On the booking form, enter "Casey Nguyen" as the contact name, "casey.nguyen@example.com" as the email, and type "Remote AI training for 30-person European sales team" in the notes or objectives field.
If there is a desired start date field, select a start date in "October 2026", choose "30" as the number of participants if required, and click the main button to submit the booking request.

website_type: business strategy and ai consulting website
